news.title:
Alkem Labs raises investment for Ujjain unit to ₹1,036 crore.
Board approves doubling from ₹533 crore for phased greenfield facility setup.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs raises investment for Ujjain unit to ₹1,036 crore.
Board approves doubling from ₹533 crore for phased greenfield facility setup.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories' board approved raising investment for a new plant from ₹533cr to ₹1,036cr.
The facility is in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh, with phased investment planned.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories' board approved raising investment for a new plant from ₹533cr to ₹1,036cr.
The facility is in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh, with phased investment planned.

news.title:
Alkem Labs board approves ₹1,036 cr investment for Ujjain plant, up from ₹533 cr.
The greenfield formulations plant will be executed in phases as per the plan.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs board approves ₹1,036 cr investment for Ujjain plant, up from ₹533 cr.
The greenfield formulations plant will be executed in phases as per the plan.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories has set up a wholly owned subsidiary, Alkem Pharmaceuticals Scientific Office FZ LLC, in Dubai Healthcare City, UAE.
The subsidiary aims to manufacture products and obtain registrations, with an authorized capital of AED 3.7M.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories has set up a wholly owned subsidiary, Alkem Pharmaceuticals Scientific Office FZ LLC, in Dubai Healthcare City, UAE.
The subsidiary aims to manufacture products and obtain registrations, with an authorized capital of AED 3.7M.

news.title: Alkem aims for leadership in weight loss drugs via aggressive generic pricing.
news.summary: Alkem aims for leadership in weight loss drugs via aggressive generic pricing.

news.title:
Alkem Labs gets DCGI nod to produce semaglutide injection for Type 2 diabetes.
It will launch under Semasize, Obesema, and Hepaglide, priced at ₹1,800/month.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs gets DCGI nod to produce semaglutide injection for Type 2 diabetes.
It will launch under Semasize, Obesema, and Hepaglide, priced at ₹1,800/month.

news.title:
Alkem Labs plans to launch semaglutide, shifting focus from acute to chronic segments.
The generic version launch is expected post patent expiry on March 20, 2026.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs plans to launch semaglutide, shifting focus from acute to chronic segments.
The generic version launch is expected post patent expiry on March 20, 2026.

news.title:
Alkem Labs' Daman facility gets EU GMP certification; plans greenfield unit in Ujjain.
Q3FY25 results: Net profit up 5% YoY at ₹626 cr; EBITDA margin rises to 22.5%.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs' Daman facility gets EU GMP certification; plans greenfield unit in Ujjain.
Q3FY25 results: Net profit up 5% YoY at ₹626 cr; EBITDA margin rises to 22.5%.

news.title:
Alkem Labs received 30-acre allotment at DMIC Vikram Udyogpuri, Ujjain.
Plans greenfield formulations unit with phased INR 533 crore investment in Ujjain.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs received 30-acre allotment at DMIC Vikram Udyogpuri, Ujjain.
Plans greenfield formulations unit with phased INR 533 crore investment in Ujjain.

news.title:
Alkem's Baddi facility received EU GMP compliance certificate valid for 3 years.
Inspection conducted by German Health Authority from 4-10 Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Alkem's Baddi facility received EU GMP compliance certificate valid for 3 years.
Inspection conducted by German Health Authority from 4-10 Nov 2025.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories to acquire 51-55% stake in Swiss firm Occlutech.
Acquisition, under SEBI regulations, finalized on March 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories to acquire 51-55% stake in Swiss firm Occlutech.
Acquisition, under SEBI regulations, finalized on March 6, 2026.

news.title:
Alkem Labs shared a video of its Investor Meet on strategic plans.
Recording is accessible on their website under 'Investor Meet' section.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs shared a video of its Investor Meet on strategic plans.
Recording is accessible on their website under 'Investor Meet' section.

news.title:
Alkem Laboratories executed a block trade of ~110,055 shares at Rs. 5455.50.
The transaction totaled Rs. 60.04 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:
Alkem Laboratories executed a block trade of ~110,055 shares at Rs. 5455.50.
The transaction totaled Rs. 60.04 crores on the NSE.

news.title:
Alkem MedTech targets the $680B global MedTech market, focusing on Orthopedic and Cardiovascular segments.
Plans CE & CIS approvals by FY28, aiming for 50% quarterly implant growth under experienced leadership.
news.summary:
Alkem MedTech targets the $680B global MedTech market, focusing on Orthopedic and Cardiovascular segments.
Plans CE & CIS approvals by FY28, aiming for 50% quarterly implant growth under experienced leadership.

news.title:
USFDA completed PAI at Alkem's Pune facility on Feb 13, 2026.
Form 483 issued with 6 observations; no data integrity issues identified.
news.summary:
USFDA completed PAI at Alkem's Pune facility on Feb 13, 2026.
Form 483 issued with 6 observations; no data integrity issues identified.

news.title:
Alkem Lab's Enzene gets 6 USFDA observations; no data integrity issues.
Alkem's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 2% YoY; shares up 1.4%, trading at Rs 5,475.85.
news.summary:
Alkem Lab's Enzene gets 6 USFDA observations; no data integrity issues.
Alkem's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 2% YoY; shares up 1.4%, trading at Rs 5,475.85.

news.title:
USFDA completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at Alkem's subsidiary Enzene Biosciences.
Six procedural observations noted, none related to data integrity; responses are being prepared.
news.summary:
USFDA completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at Alkem's subsidiary Enzene Biosciences.
Six procedural observations noted, none related to data integrity; responses are being prepared.

news.title:
Alkem Labs fell over 5% despite a record ₹43 interim dividend and modest Q3 growth.
Company plans to acquire Occlutech for $180M; revenue rose 10.7% to ₹3,737 crore YoY.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs fell over 5% despite a record ₹43 interim dividend and modest Q3 growth.
Company plans to acquire Occlutech for $180M; revenue rose 10.7% to ₹3,737 crore YoY.

news.title:
Alkem Labs to acquire 51-55% of Occlutech for €180.7M by June 2026.
Occlutech specializes in cardiac implants; revenue projected at €49.4M in 2025.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs to acquire 51-55% of Occlutech for €180.7M by June 2026.
Occlutech specializes in cardiac implants; revenue projected at €49.4M in 2025.

news.title:
Alkem Labs to hold 51% in Saudi JV; Vitals Biotech replaces original partner.
Board approved JV amendment on Feb 13, 2026; partner's firm holds 49%.
news.summary:
Alkem Labs to hold 51% in Saudi JV; Vitals Biotech replaces original partner.
Board approved JV amendment on Feb 13, 2026; partner's firm holds 49%.
